channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Rape accuser Jessica Mann testifies against Harvey Weinstein for a third time
item.description: A woman who accused Harvey Weinstein of raping her in 2013 is testifying for the third time against the former movie magnate.

item.title: Man charged with attempted assassination of Trump in White House correspondents’ dinner shooting
Prosecutors say suspect in missing students’ killings asked ChatGPT about disposing of a body
